name: Intervention Scheduler to boost mastery
description: Intervention Scheduler to boost mastery summarizes assessments and flags content metadata; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via Analytics Lake to increase completion.

steps.name: Module Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize attendance from Identity/SSO; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Draft
steps.description: Execute draft phase for the Reflection pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Self-Critique
steps.description: Execute self-critique phase for the Reflection pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Intervention
steps.description: Intervention across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Personalized Plan
steps.description: Personalized Plan across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Progress Review
steps.description: Progress Review across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Readiness Check
steps.description: Readiness Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Practice Recommendation
steps.description: Practice Recommendation across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Transcript Update
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to Identity/SSO; return response JSON for the client.
